title: Crumbed Chops

html:
CRUMBED CHOPS

INGREDIENTS

  • 8 lamb chops
  • 2 packets brown onion soup powder
  • 500 ml panko crumbs
  • 125 ml parmesan cheese
  • 100 ml parsley, finely chopped
  • 30 ml finely chopped rosemary
  • 100 ml English mustard
  • 3 eggs, whisked

 

Method

  1. Get three flat bowls ready. In one is the onion soup powder, then in the second the whisked eggs and in the third the panko crumbs, parmesan, parsley and rosemary
  2. Pat the chops nice and dry and spread the mustard on both sides.
  3. Press them into the soup powder, then into the egg and then into the crumbs
  4. Fry them in shallow oil until nicely browned on both sides
  5. Place them on a baking tray and bake for 20 minutes at 180C
